rules: single: one prompt generates one final asset.
group_variant: one prompt group generates multiple clearly named variants.
single_master: generate one master asset, then reuse/crop for multiple pages.
reuse or reuse_crop: do not regenerate; derive from reuseSource.

assets.styleDifference: Hero banner with main subject on one side and clean blank area for frontend overlay.
assets.frontEndUsage: Use as banner background; overlay text and buttons in frontend code.
